images.prompt: "A full view of The Chair (JH501) by Hans J. Wegner, placed in a softly lit, minimalist setting with a warm, diffused glow (2700-3000K). The chair is positioned at a three-quarter angle, showcasing its curved wooden frame, seamless joinery, and iconic organic form, with a neutral Danish Modern backdrop subtly complementing its timeless design."

"A side-profile silhouette of The Chair (JH501), set against a clean, minimal backdrop in warm, diffused lighting. The shot highlights the chair’s signature organic geometry, with its rounded frame and elegant balance of curves and straight lines."
